pkgmetadata.longdescription: OpenTelemetry Psycopg Instrumentationpypi.. pypi image httpsbadge.fury.iopyopentelemetry-instrumentation-psycopg2.svg target httpspypi.orgprojectopentelemetry-instrumentation-psycopg2Installation------------ pip install opentelemetry-instrumentation-psycopg2References---------- OpenTelemetry Psycopg Instrumentation httpsopentelemetry-python-contrib.readthedocs.ioenlatestinstrumentationpsycopg2psycopg2.html_ OpenTelemetry Project httpsopentelemetry.io_ OpenTelemetry Python Examples httpsgithub.comopen-telemetryopentelemetry-pythontreemaindocsexamples_
